column1: # ZAP scan rules configuration for Bookshelf API
# This is a JSON API (no HTML rendering). Rules that produce false positives for
# pure JSON APIs are set to IGNORE; critical injection/execution rules are FAIL.
# ── IGNORE: false positives for a JSON API ────────────────────────────────────

column3: Incomplete or No Cache-control Header — JSON API responses intentionally omit Cache-Control
Information Disclosure - Suspicious Comments — source comments not present post-deploy
Charset Mismatch (Header Versus Meta Charset) — not applicable to JSON responses
Timestamp Disclosure — ISO timestamps in JSON responses are intentional

column1: # ── WARN: track but do not fail the build ─────────────────────────────────────

column3: CSP Scanner — CSP is set; warnings are for review only
Absence of Anti-CSRF Tokens — API uses JWT Bearer tokens, not cookie-based sessions

column1: # ── FAIL: hard failures — any finding blocks the pipeline ─────────────────────
